result.status_detail: Country restriction wall — '회원님의 국가에서는 아직 Meta AI를 이용할 수 없습니다' — no chat input rendered, cannot send prompt or verify '차단' warning

notes: v2.2.3 REBUILT mass rotation #855 — meta. Opened https://www.meta.ai/?rid=00000000-apf0-warn-0000-000000000855 in fresh Chrome tab. Page rendered Meta AI loading-ring logo with Korean message: '회원님의 국가에서는 아직 Meta AI를 이용할 수 없습니다' (Meta AI is not yet available in your country) and sub-text '그동안 Meta에서 제공하는 AI 솔루션에 대해 자세히 알아보세요. 더 알아보기' plus a single button 'Meta AI에서 로그아웃' (Logout from Meta AI). No chat input field, no prompt textarea, no send affordance — service-level geo block prevents any APF exercise. URL stayed at meta.ai/?rid=...855 (no redirect). User session is logged in (logout button visible) but country gate supersedes auth. This is a stricter wall than prior #827 (which at least showed a chat input before pop-up auth modal). v2.2.3 REBUILT engine cannot be evaluated against meta in this rotation; result is consistent with the persistent test-PC-region issue against meta.ai documented in #827. Classifying as error_AUTH_REQUIRED (closest matching category — login state is irrelevant because country gate blocks chat surface entirely; APF was never given a chance to inject the warning). No regression signal vs prior baseline — both runs produced unverifiable results due to meta.ai access controls, not APF behavior.
